CONFIGURATIONS.ENTITIES_I: Manage the general entities of the platform.
CONFIGURATIONS.ADD_USERS_BY_THEIR_USERNAME: Add users by their ESN Accounts username.
CONFIGURATIONS.ADMINISTRATORS_I: Users in this list can manage the whole platform.
CONFIGURATIONS.ERS_MANAGERS_I: Users in this list can manage ERS events and registrations.
CONFIGURATIONS.BANNED_USERS_I: Users in this list won't be able to register to events.
CONFIGURATIONS.NO_BANNED_USERS: Luckily, no banned users so far.
CONFIGURATIONS.EMAIL_TEMPLATES_I: Set the templates for the following notification emails.
CONFIGURATIONS.DISPLAY_OPTIONS_I: Personalise the interface the following options.
CONFIGURATIONS.ORIGIN_DISPLAY_PREFERENCE_I: When displaying the general data of a user (e.g. in questions), this is the origin information you want to show.
CONFIGURATIONS.APP_TITLE_I: This name will be used in the login page and everywhere in the app.
CONFIGURATIONS.APP_SUBTITLE_I: This name will be used in the login page and everywhere in the app.
CONFIGURATIONS.SUPPORT_EMAIL_I: The email address where your users should reach you in case they need help.
CONFIGURATIONS.APP_LOGO_LIGHT_I: This logo will be used in the login page and everywhere in the app (light background, default).
CONFIGURATIONS.APP_LOGO_DARK_I: This logo will be used in the login page and everywhere in the app (dark background).
CONFIGURATIONS.RESET_APP_LOGO_I: This will reset the app logo to the default one.
CONFIGURATIONS.TIMEZONE_OF_REFERENCE_I: This timezone will be used to display dates and deadlines.
CONFIGURATIONS.HIDE_APP_FEATURES_I: Features will be hidden only from the menu; direct links to specific features will keep working.

PROFILE.FEEDBACK_OR_HELP: Send feedback or ask for help
PROFILE.FEEDBACK_EMAIL_SUBJECT: ESN Event Registration System app - Feedback

BADGES.GIVE_BADGES_I: Badges are usually earned through automatic actions, but here you can force them.
BADGES.NO_BADGES: No badges so far. While you're using the app, you will earn some. Go get them all and make your ESNer friends envy you!
BADGES.YOU_EARNED_A_BADGE: Congrats!! You've earned a shiny new badge!

BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.FIRST_QUESTION: Congrats for starting your way into the app!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.QUESTIONS_MASTER: This is the way! Asking lots of healthy questions help the Network grow stronger.
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.NEWCOMER: You're finally acclimating to the tool. We are happy about it!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.KNOW_IT_ALL: Soooo many questions, but you saw it through. Amazing job!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.LOVE_GIVER: You're a true supporter! Continue smashing that upvote button!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.POKEMON_HUNTER: You did catch'em all! Every candidates knows you now.
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.RISING_STAR: You're the bright future of our Network. Congrats, candidate!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.CHEERGIVER: The appreciation round is your arena! As loud as you can be.
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.CHAIRING_WIZARD: You know how it feels to be on the other side of the desk. Be sure to stand up from time to time!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.SHOW_MAKER: If there's some fuss, you're around. Drama is your bread and butter.
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.MIC_CATCHER: The boogeyperson of the Speakers List and the GA Administrator's worst nightmare.
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.JOKER: The sovereign of the spam chats. The memes master. The jokes authority.
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.ENERGY_DRIVER: You are like a magnet: people float around your endless energy: on fire!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.FABULOUS_SCRIBE: Your pen work is helping the Network be better. You should be proud!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.ONLOOKER: Nothing escapes your sight! Thanks for sharing your superpower with us.
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.PLENARIES_RUNNER: Such legwork: how many calories did you burn? Thank you!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.SPECTATOR: Maybe you're not in the centre of the action, but damn, such a spectator. Enjoy, my friend!
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.RAPID_ROCKET_SPEAKER: Faster than the speed of sound. Eminem is that you?
BUILT_IN_BADGES_I.FIRST_DANCE: You are paving the way for others and have no shame in being the first to intervene. We like you!

PRIVACY_POLICY.TITLE: PRIVACY NOTICE FOR THE PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA PURSUANT TO ART. 13-14 GDPR
PRIVACY_POLICY.INTRO: Dear data subject, we hereby wish to inform you of the methods and terms of processing of your personal data in accordance with Articles 13 and 14 of EU Regulation 679/2016 and Italian Legislative Decree 196/2003 as amended.
PRIVACY_POLICY.DATA_CONTROLLER_TEXT: Erasmus Student Network Italia – ESN Italia - ETS, with registered office at Via Anastasio II, 80 - 00165 Rome (RM).
PRIVACY_POLICY.DATA_CONTROLLER_CONTACTS: Contact points of the Data Controller, email: info@esn.it; amministrazione@esn.it
PRIVACY_POLICY.DATA_ORIGIN_TEXT_1: Your personal data processed by the Controller is normally provided directly by you; however, it may also be acquired from other external parties (e.g., local associations belonging to the ESN group). The processing may involve common personal data.
PRIVACY_POLICY.DATA_ORIGIN_TEXT_2: More precisely, the Controller processes tax, personal and contact data that will be used for invoicing and for the fulfilment of all other administrative, bureaucratic, fiscal obligations and for carrying out all activities generally related to the existing relationship, as well as for all remaining purposes indicated in the following point.
PRIVACY_POLICY.PURPOSE_TITLE: Purpose of Processing and Legal Basis
PRIVACY_POLICY.PURPOSE_INTRO: Your personal data will be processed for the following purposes and on the basis of the following legal grounds:
PRIVACY_POLICY.TABLE_ROW1_DATA: Identity document, tax, personal and contact data
PRIVACY_POLICY.TABLE_ROW1_PURPOSE: Invoicing and the fulfilment of all other administrative, bureaucratic, fiscal obligations for carrying out all activities related to the existing relationship, such as creating an account with assignment of a unique email address
PRIVACY_POLICY.TABLE_ROW1_LEGAL_1: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR: processing is necessary for the performance of a contract to which the data subject is party or in order to take steps at the request of the data subject prior to entering into a contract
PRIVACY_POLICY.TABLE_ROW1_LEGAL_2: Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR: processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation to which the Controller is subject
PRIVACY_POLICY.TABLE_ROW2_PURPOSE: They may also be processed in cases of the Controller's liability for damages caused to the data subject and for the management of complaints/grievances and disputes and other obligations provided for by specific laws and/or regulations
PRIVACY_POLICY.TABLE_ROW2_LEGAL: Art. 6(1)(f): processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the Controller
PRIVACY_POLICY.RECIPIENTS_TEXT: Your personal data (or that of the person(s) you legally represent/are guardian of) is not subject to dissemination; however, it may be communicated to public and private entities, bodies and institutions to achieve the purposes specified above and in cases provided for by law or regulation. Such suppliers, depending on the case, may be configured as Data Processors, independent Data Controllers or Joint Controllers. The list of Processors may be requested from the Controller's contact points.
PRIVACY_POLICY.TRANSFER_TEXT_1: Your data is not transferred outside the EU territory.
PRIVACY_POLICY.TRANSFER_TEXT_2: However, they may be transferred outside the European Economic Area if this is necessary for the management of your employment relationship with the Controller, for example through the use of platforms located in the USA. In such cases, data recipients will be required to comply with protection and security obligations equivalent to those guaranteed by the Controller. In any case, only the data necessary for the pursuit of the intended purposes described will be communicated and, where required, the safeguards applicable to transfers of data to third countries will be applied.
PRIVACY_POLICY.PROCESSING_TEXT: Your data is processed lawfully and fairly, in accordance with Articles 5 and 6 of the Regulation, for the pursuit of the purposes indicated above and in compliance with the fundamental principles established by the applicable legislation. The processing of personal data may take place both by manual and by electronic and telematic means, but always under the supervision of technical and organisational measures suitable to guarantee its security and confidentiality, especially in order to reduce the risks of destruction or loss, including accidental, of data, unauthorised access, or processing not permitted or not in conformity with the purposes of collection. Personal data will be processed by the Controller only for the time necessary to provide the requested services; in general, the retention period is 10 years, unless it is necessary to store them for longer periods as a result of laws, regulations and EU rules or for the resolution of disputes or judicial investigations.
PRIVACY_POLICY.DATA_PROVISION_TEXT_1: Your data is provided mandatorily in order to carry out pre-contractual or contractual measures with the Data Controller, or to comply with legal obligations incumbent on the Controller, such as invoicing activities. In the absence of data provision, no service can be performed.
PRIVACY_POLICY.DATA_PROVISION_TEXT_2: If the data is not collected directly from the data subject, it is noted that it may have been communicated to the Controller by a local ESN section of which you are a member.
PRIVACY_POLICY.RIGHTS_TEXT: You may exercise at any time the rights that are recognised to you, including: a) access your personal data, obtaining evidence of the purposes pursued by the Data Controller, the categories of data involved, the recipients to whom the data may be communicated, the applicable retention period, the existence of automated decision-making processes; b) obtain without delay the rectification of inaccurate personal data concerning you; c) obtain, in the cases provided for, the erasure of your data; d) obtain the restriction of processing, where possible; e) request the portability of data provided to third parties specifically designated by you, or to receive them in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format, also to transmit such data to another Controller, without hindrance, in all cases where this is required by law; f) lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority. The exercise of the above rights is subject to the limits, rules and procedures provided for by European Regulation 679/16 that the Data Subject must know and implement. In accordance with Article 12(3), the Controller shall provide the data subject with information on the action taken without undue delay and, in any event, at the latest within 30 days of receipt of the request. This term may be extended by 60 days if necessary, taking into account the complexity and number of requests. The Data Controller shall inform the data subject of any such extension, and of the reasons for the delay, within 30 days of receipt of the request. To exercise these rights, it is sufficient to send a written request to the Data Controller or to the Data Protection Officer at the addresses indicated below using the appropriate forms available at the office or on the institutional website.
PRIVACY_POLICY.DPO_TEXT: The Data Controller has not appointed a Data Protection Officer (DPO) as it is not required to do so by current legislation.
